text: {"matches":[{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":1,"rationale":"Claim 0 describes a promotional excerpt, while Claim 1 describes the original report; they refer to different sources."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 0 concerns a promotional excerpt, whereas Claim 2 concerns the effect of removing words from the report’s sentence; they address different contexts."},{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 1 provides the exact sentence, while Claim 2 makes a broader statement about meaning reversal when the opening and closing words are removed."}]}
